component_details.name: Honey Swap
component_details.description: Native dApp for trading assets for $HONEY and minting $HONEY.

behavior_details.name: Swap Assets
behavior_details.description: External User exchanges one token for another on BEX.

data_flow_details.description: BEX sends swapped tokens or LP tokens back to the user wallet.

boundary_details.name: Centralized Exchange to User Wallet
boundary_details.description: Separates the external centralized exchange from the user's local wallet.

security_gap.gap_description: RPC endpoint lacks sufficient rate-limiting or anti-DoS measures.

actor_risk.description: Any external user can send requests to the RPC.

actor_details.name: External User
actor_details.description: General user interacting with the Berachain ecosystem.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Ability for unauthenticated/unauthorized users to flood the RPC.

assumptions: The RPC endpoint does not have effective rate-limiting.
An attacker has sufficient resources to generate high volume traffic.

mitigation.strategy: Implement robust rate-limiting and DoS protection on RPC endpoints.

description: An attacker floods the Berachain RPC endpoint with excessive connection requests, disrupting network availability for legitimate users.

component_details.name: BeraHub (Frontend)
component_details.description: Web interface for managing $BGT, accessing liquidity, and participating in governance.

behavior_details.name: Claim Rewards (BeraHub)
behavior_details.description: External User claims earned rewards (BGT, Incentives, Fees) via BeraHub.

data_flow_details.description: User interacts with the BeraHub frontend.

boundary_details.name: Validator to Berachain
boundary_details.description: Separates the validator node from the core blockchain consensus.

security_gap.gap_description: Governance contract fails to validate transaction sender's signature or BGT balance/delegation.

actor_details.name: External User
actor_details.description: General user interacting with the Berachain ecosystem.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Forged governance transactions could manipulate network decisions.

assumptions: The governance contract does not properly verify transaction signatures.
The governance contract does not properly check the sender's BGT balance or delegation required for the action.

mitigation.strategy: Ensure strict signature validation and BGT balance/delegation checks in the governance contract.

description: An attacker forges a signed governance transaction (vote or proposal), potentially manipulating governance outcomes or bypassing BGT requirements.

component_details.name: BeraHub (Frontend)
component_details.description: Web interface for managing $BGT, accessing liquidity, and participating in governance.

behavior_details.name: Claim Rewards (BeraHub)
behavior_details.description: External User claims earned rewards (BGT, Incentives, Fees) via BeraHub.

data_flow_details.description: User interacts with the BeraHub frontend.

boundary_details.name: Validator to Berachain
boundary_details.description: Separates the validator node from the core blockchain consensus.

security_gap.gap_description: Governance contract logic is susceptible to resource exhaustion via transaction spam or complex calls.

actor_risk.description: The user interacts with the governance contract.

actor_details.name: External User
actor_details.description: General user interacting with the Berachain ecosystem.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Attacker could impede governance process availability.

assumptions: The governance contract has state or logic that can be exploited for DoS.
Gas costs do not sufficiently deter DoS attempts.

mitigation.strategy: Optimize governance contract logic to prevent resource exhaustion.

description: An attacker floods the governance contract with transactions or specifically crafted calls to impede the governance process.

origin.capability_match: Add Incentives For Reward Vault on Hub

component_details.name: Reward Vault (Smart Contract)
component_details.description: Smart contract where users stake PoL-eligible assets to earn $BGT rewards.

behavior_details.name: Vote on Governance Proposal
behavior_details.description: External User casts a vote on a governance proposal.

data_flow_details.description: Berachain returns state data to BeraHub.

boundary_details.name: Validator to Berachain
boundary_details.description: Separates the validator node from the core blockchain consensus.

security_gap.gap_description: Contract fails to verify if sender is the authorized Incentive Token Manager.

actor_risk.description: The user attempts to add incentives.

actor_details.name: External User
actor_details.description: General user interacting with the Berachain ecosystem.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Unauthorized users could add incorrect or malicious incentives.

assumptions: Reward Vault or Incentive Distributor contract does not verify the sender is the authorized Incentive Token Manager for the specified vault/token.

mitigation.strategy: Implement strict authorization checks (e.g., msg.sender against manager address) in contracts allowing incentive addition.

description: An attacker attempts to add or modify incentives in a Reward Vault without being the authorized Incentive Token Manager, potentially disrupting incentive distribution.

trace_source.matched_capability: Add Incentives For Reward Vault on Hub

component_details.name: Governance Contract
component_details.description: Smart contract managing governance proposals, voting, and delegation.

asset_details.name: Voting Power
asset_details.description: Influence in governance decisions, derived from BGT holdings/delegation.

behavior_details.name: Withdraw Staked Assets
behavior_details.description: External User withdraws staked assets from a Reward Vault.

data_flow_details.description: Incentive tokens available for claiming by the user from the distributor.

boundary_details.name: Validator to Berachain
boundary_details.description: Separates the validator node from the core blockchain consensus.

security_gap.gap_description: BEX contract logic contains bugs allowing unfair swaps, LP token minting, or asset manipulation.

actor_risk.description: The user interacts with the BEX contract.

actor_details.name: External User
actor_details.description: General user interacting with the Berachain ecosystem.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Vulnerabilities in core DEX logic can lead to significant financial loss or protocol manipulation.

assumptions: The BEX smart contract contains a logic vulnerability.
An attacker can craft a transaction exploiting this vulnerability.

mitigation.strategy: Conduct thorough audits and formal verification of the BEX smart contract logic.

description: An attacker exploits a vulnerability in the BEX contract to perform unfair swaps, mint unbacked LP tokens, or manipulate assets within liquidity pools, leading to potential financial loss.

component_details.name: HoneyFactory (Smart Contract)
component_details.description: Central smart contract hub for $HONEY minting, connecting vaults.

behavior_details.name: Propose Block
behavior_details.description: Validator proposes a new block to the chain.

data_flow_details.description: Validator stakes BERA on the chain.

boundary_details.name: Validator to Berachain
boundary_details.description: Separates the validator node from the core blockchain consensus.

security_gap.gap_description: Honey Swap contract logic contains bugs allowing unbacked HONEY minting, incorrect burning, or collateral manipulation.

actor_risk.description: The user interacts with the Honey Swap contract.

actor_details.name: External User
actor_details.description: General user interacting with the Berachain ecosystem.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Vulnerabilities in the stablecoin minting/burning logic can depeg HONEY or cause financial loss.

assumptions: The Honey Swap smart contract contains a logic vulnerability.
An attacker can craft a transaction exploiting this vulnerability.

mitigation.strategy: Conduct thorough audits and formal verification of the Honey Swap smart contract logic.

description: An attacker exploits a vulnerability in the Honey Swap contract to mint HONEY without sufficient collateral or manipulate collateral assets, potentially depegging HONEY.

origin.capability_match: Bridge NFTs from Ethereum to Berachain

component_details.name: FeeCollector (Smart Contract)
component_details.description: Smart contract collecting dApp fees and distributing them to $BGT holders.

behavior_details.name: Direct BGT Emissions
behavior_details.description: Validator allocates a portion of BGT emissions to a specific Reward Vault.

data_flow_details.description: Validator directs a portion of BGT emissions to a Reward Vault.

boundary_details.name: Validator to Berachain
boundary_details.description: Separates the validator node from the core blockchain consensus.

security_gap.gap_description: NFT Bridge contract fails to verify ownership of NFTs on the source chain before minting on Berachain.

actor_risk.description: The user attempts to bridge NFTs.

actor_details.name: External User
actor_details.description: General user interacting with the Berachain ecosystem.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Attacker could mint unbacked NFT assets on Berachain, diluting legitimate collections.

assumptions: The NFT Bridge contract's ownership verification logic for the source chain is flawed or bypassable.

mitigation.strategy: Ensure robust and secure verification of NFT ownership on the source chain before facilitating bridging.

description: An attacker exploits a vulnerability in the NFT Bridge contract to bridge NFTs they do not legitimately own on the source chain, leading to unauthorized minting on Berachain.

trace_source.matched_capability: Bridge NFTs from Ethereum to Berachain

component_details.name: BGTIncentiveDistributor (Smart Contract)
component_details.description: Smart contract managing the distribution and claiming of Incentive Tokens for Boosters.

behavior_details.name: Receive Incentive Commission
behavior_details.description: Validator receives a commission on incentive tokens distributed via the BGTIncentiveDistributor.

data_flow_details.description: Reward Vault sends incentive tokens to the distribution contract.

boundary_details.name: Validator to Berachain
boundary_details.description: Separates the validator node from the core blockchain consensus.

security_gap.gap_description: Canonical Bridge contract logic or its cross-chain verification mechanism is flawed, allowing unbacked asset minting.

actor_risk.description: The user attempts to bridge assets.

actor_details.name: External User
actor_details.description: General user interacting with the Berachain ecosystem.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Vulnerabilities in the canonical bridge can lead to infinite minting and total loss of confidence/value.

assumptions: The Canonical Bridge contract's cross-chain verification logic is flawed.
The integration with LayerZero (or other cross-chain mechanism) has a vulnerability.

mitigation.strategy: Conduct rigorous audits and testing of the bridge contract and its cross-chain verification mechanism.

description: An attacker exploits a vulnerability in the Canonical Bridge contract to mint unbacked $BERA or other assets on Berachain, severely compromising network integrity.

component_details.name: BeaconKit
component_details.description: Modular consensus layer framework leveraging CometBFT.

behavior_details.name: Trade Tokens
behavior_details.description: External User trades tokens on a Centralized Exchange.

data_flow_details.description: User sends assets to the bridge contract.

boundary_details.name: Centralized Exchange to User Wallet
boundary_details.description: Separates the external centralized exchange from the user's local wallet.

security_gap.gap_description: Airdrop checker/RPC endpoint allows enumeration of allocation amounts for arbitrary addresses/social handles without rate-limiting or authentication.

actor_risk.description: Any external user can query allocation data.

actor_details.name: External User
actor_details.description: General user interacting with the Berachain ecosystem.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Information is likely public anyway, but large-scale enumeration might be undesired.

assumptions: The airdrop allocation data is accessible via public query.
Rate-limiting on queries is insufficient or missing.

mitigation.strategy: Implement rate-limiting on airdrop checker queries.

description: An attacker enumerates the BERA airdrop allocations for a large number of addresses or social handles by querying the airdrop checker, potentially violating user privacy regarding their allocation.
